title: Distill a multi-task strategy teacher into tabular meta-features
summary: Adjacent F1 papers report value from predicting pit timing jointly with auxiliary targets such as laps-to-stop and compound choice.
rationale: Adjacent F1 papers report value from predicting pit timing jointly with auxiliary targets such as laps-to-stop and compound choice. Instead of replacing the current tabular stack, use that richer teacher to generate OOF strategy-intent features.
implementation_hint: Train a small teacher with heads for `PitNextLap`, remaining laps until next pit, and next-compound class. Keep it leak-safe and OOF; feed its logits, expected remaining laps, and compound probabilities to the existing classifier as extra features.
expected_effect: Injects strategy intent and horizon information without needing a full end-to-end sequence submission model.
risk: More training complexity; weak teachers can just add noise if not generated OOF.
